text_original: it's good but use only ai by them your ai has no photo
text_zh: 挺好的，但只用它们自己的AI，你的AI没有照片。
reply_original: Hi there! Thanks for your feedback. Actually, our characters can send photos! You can tap the icon in the bottom-left of the chat box to generate an image, or simply ask the AI to send you a photo during your chat. If you encounter any issues with this, please contact us at support@fantachat.ai so we can help you out!
reply_zh: 你好！感谢您的反馈。实际上，我们的角色是可以发送照片的！您可以点击聊天框左下角的图标来生成图片，或者在聊天过程中直接让AI给您发送照片。如果您在此过程中遇到任何问题，请通过 support@fantachat.ai 联系我们，以便我们为您提供帮助！
